name: Endpoint Disk Encryption Enabled
description: Corporate endpoints (laptops/desktops) should have full disk encryption enabled (FileVault on macOS, BitLocker on Windows)
remediation: Enable full disk encryption on the device through MDM policy enforcement or manual configuration
remediation_steps: Identify the device without disk encryption
For macOS: Enable FileVault via MDM or System Preferences
For Windows: Enable BitLocker via MDM or Group Policy
Store recovery keys securely in MDM
